name: Content: Monthly Report

description.en: Automatically generate a monthly summary of content created and performance insights.
description.de: Automatisch eine monatliche Zusammenfassung der erstellten Inhalte und Performance-Einblicke generieren.
description.fr: Generez automatiquement un resume mensuel du contenu cree et des performances.
description.es: Generar automaticamente un resumen mensual del contenido creado y las estadisticas de rendimiento.
description.ro: Genereaza automat un rezumat lunar al continutului creat si al performantei.

bot: When this warp is triggered: summarize the content created this month using the agent's activity history. List how many posts were created, which platforms were used, and which content types were produced. Highlight top-performing content if data is available. Suggest improvements and focus areas for next month. Send the report as a formatted message in the current room. Do NOT use Studio tools -- this is text-only output.

actions.prompt: Summarize the content activity this month. How many posts were created, which platforms were used, and suggest improvements for next month.
